description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on tag creation, push to master, and pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: Lint and Build. The Lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up Python 3.x, checks out the code, installs flake8, and runs it. The Build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-16.04, macos-latest, and windows-latest, sets up Python 3.x, checks out the code with submodules, creates a directory, runs cmake and builds the project, and executes unit tests, C-API tests, and tests.
